subcodes.title: Public address to Congress of East-West Relations, spoken on 1912-04-20
subcodes.first_line: Tonight I am most happy, for I have presented myself to an audience like unto this
subcodes.first_line_orig: امشب من نهایت سرور دارم که در همچو مجمع و محفلی وارد شدم من شرقی هستم
subcodes.subjects: @need for cooperation; solitary existence not possible, @unity of governments; political unity, @praise of Western values; culture, @unity; oneness of humanity, @suffering and imprisonment, @service to others; to the Cause of God
